subject: Project Management
title: Hybrid Approaches
description: A quick, practical guide to Hybrid Approaches.

hook.text: What if you don't have to choose? Hybrid approaches combine waterfall's planning with agile's flexibility.

buildup.text: Water-Scrum-Fall: waterfall for requirements and deployment, Scrum for development sprints in between.

discovery.text: Many organizations naturally evolve toward hybrids as they realize pure approaches don't fit their reality.

twist.text: Critics call hybrids 'the worst of both worlds.' Advocates say they're the pragmatic middle ground.

climax.text: The 2023 PMI Pulse report found that 25% of organizations now use hybrid methods — the fastest-growing category.

punchline.text: Pure methods are elegant. Real projects are messy. Hybrids bridge the gap.

quiz.question: What is Water-Scrum-Fall?
options: A hybrid using waterfall for planning and deployment with Scrum for development
A type of waterfall testing method
